title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.027 - Scope of coverage
text:
701.027.  Scope of coverage. — Sections 701.025 to 701.059 pertains to maximum daily flows of sewage of three thousand gallons or less and to sewage treatment facilities that have a designed maximum daily flow or an actual maximum daily flow of three thousand gallons or less.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1101 § 2, A.L. 1994 S.B. 446)
